{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Overall Purpose


	To ensure optimal utilization/maintenance of the company&rsquo;s vehicles and execution of approved logistics plans, policies, and procedures towards ensuring achievement of the company&rsquo;s immediate and strategic objectives.


Principal Accountabilities


	Co-ordinate timely dispatch and arrival of bakery products / raw material to all outlets
	Plan and co-ordinate the management of all company vehicles.
	Management of vendors to all company artisans (service providers)
	Ensure appropriate weighing, pricing/quotes for all vehicle-related issues on repairs, maintenance, and fixings
	Ensure all logistics representatives/ Drivers are following the company&#39;s core values regarding their duties and work tools.
	Coordinates and manages third-party vendors/vehicles to minimal cost or complete eradication from the business.
	Responsible for reducing operational costs through effective fuel management and optimization of logistics processes.
	Assist in liaising with federal, state, and local government officials and other government agencies to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements for vehicle-related issues.


Competencies, Skills &amp; Behaviours


	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent time management and scheduling abilities
	Clear written and verbal communication skills
	Problem-solving and decision-making under pressure
	Route planning and fleet coordination knowledge
	Knowledge of safety, hygiene, and regulatory compliance
	Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.


Salary
N200,000&nbsp;/ month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@consultingdcc.com.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Logistics Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Logistics Officer Job at Consulting DCC




        
    

        
        Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Overall Purpose


	To ensure optimal utilization/maintenance of the company’s vehicles and execution of approved logistics plans, policies, and procedures towards ensuring achievement of the company’s immediate and strategic objectives.


Principal Accountabilities


	Co-ordinate timely dispatch and arrival of bakery products / raw material to all outlets
	Plan and co-ordinate the management of all company vehicles.
	Management of vendors to all company artisans (service providers)
	Ensure appropriate weighing, pricing/quotes for all vehicle-related issues on repairs, maintenance, and fixings
	Ensure all logistics representatives/ Drivers are following the company's core values regarding their duties and work tools.
	Coordinates and manages third-party vendors/vehicles to minimal cost or complete eradication from the business.
	Responsible for reducing operational costs through effective fuel management and optimization of logistics processes.
	Assist in liaising with federal, state, and local government officials and other government agencies to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements for vehicle-related issues.


Competencies, Skills & Behaviours


	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent time management and scheduling abilities
	Clear written and verbal communication skills
	Problem-solving and decision-making under pressure
	Route planning and fleet coordination knowledge
	Knowledge of safety, hygiene, and regulatory compliance
	Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.


Salary
N200,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Logistics Officer" as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager / Content Creator",
  "description": "TalenMO is a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSMEs industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	TalenMO a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSMEs industries, is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Social Media Manager/Content Creator for one of our clients.


Job Responsibilities


	Manage, grow, and optimise the company&#39;s presence on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X (Twitter), and Google My Business
	Develop and execute platform-specific growth strategies with clear KPIs for each channel
	Monitor trends, algorithm changes, and competitor activity and adapt strategies accordingly
	Grow followers, reach, and engagement organically through consistent high-quality content
	Monitor and respond promptly to all DMs, comments, and enquiries across platforms, converting leads and maintaining brand voice
	Schedule and publish content using tools such as Buffer, Hootsuite, Meta Business Suite, or equivalent
	Develop a monthly content calendar covering all platforms with themes aligned to business goals, seasonal events, trends, and the Nigerian energy landscape
	Produce original, engaging content formats including: reels, talking-head videos, drone footage edits, carousels, infographics, testimonials, educational posts, behind-the-scenes clips, product demos, and memes
	Write high-converting copy with strong hooks, compelling body text, and clear calls to action for every post
	Translate solar energy concepts (inverters, battery storage, off-grid systems, ROI, load calculations) into simple, engaging content that non-technical audiences understand and share
	Design professional, on-brand graphics using tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva Pro, CorelDRAW, or equivalent
	Produce social media templates, banners, flyers, proposal decks, and promotional materials that reflect the company&#39;s brand identity
	Edit talking-head videos, drone footage, product installation clips, and customer testimonials to a high cinematic standard
	Use colour grading, transitions, motion graphics, text overlays, sound design, and cinematic effects to elevate raw footage
	Produce short-form viral reels (15&ndash;60 sec) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts
	Edit long-form YouTube content (3&ndash;15 min) with chapters, B-roll, graphics, and professional pacing
	Leverage AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, RunwayML, etc.) to speed up content production without compromising quality.
	Automate scheduling, reporting, and repetitive workflows using social media management platforms and automation tools
	Track, analyse, and report on key metrics: reach, impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, click-through rate, and lead volume
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable recommendations
	Use platform analytics (Meta Insights, YouTube Studio, LinkedIn Analytics, Google My Business Insights) to refine strategy
	Run A/B tests on content types, captions, and posting times to continuously improve performance
	Handle all inbound DMs and comment enquiries professionally and promptly, with the goal of qualifying leads and booking consultations
	Manage and grow WhatsApp broadcast lists and status content as a supplementary channel


General Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Mass Communication, Marketing, Digital Media, Design, or a related field
	Minimum 2&ndash;3 years of proven experience managing social media accounts and creating content for a brand, agency, or business
	Demonstrable portfolio of content created across multiple platforms (essential &mdash; must be presented at interview)
	Prior experience in an energy, tech, real estate, or product-based company is an advantage


Technical Skills (Must-Have):


	Graphic Design: Canva Pro, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW (proficiency in at least two)
	Video Editing: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (proficiency in at least two)
	Scheduling Tools: Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Hootsuite, or Later
	Analytics: Native platform dashboards (Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, Google My Business)
	AI Tools: Familiarity with AI content and automation tools is a strong advantage
	Photography: Basic smartphone and DSLR photography skills for product and lifestyle shoots
	Copywriting: Ability to write punchy, persuasive, and platform-appropriate copy in English


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;temiloluwa.talenmo@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-05",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "TalenMO"
    
  },

    }

}



Social Media Manager / Content Creator Job at TalenMO




        
    

        
        TalenMO is a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSMEs industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	TalenMO a professional recruitment and talent solutions firm dedicated to sourcing, screening, and placing the right people in the right roles across various MSMEs industries, is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Social Media Manager/Content Creator for one of our clients.


Job Responsibilities


	Manage, grow, and optimise the company's presence on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X (Twitter), and Google My Business
	Develop and execute platform-specific growth strategies with clear KPIs for each channel
	Monitor trends, algorithm changes, and competitor activity and adapt strategies accordingly
	Grow followers, reach, and engagement organically through consistent high-quality content
	Monitor and respond promptly to all DMs, comments, and enquiries across platforms, converting leads and maintaining brand voice
	Schedule and publish content using tools such as Buffer, Hootsuite, Meta Business Suite, or equivalent
	Develop a monthly content calendar covering all platforms with themes aligned to business goals, seasonal events, trends, and the Nigerian energy landscape
	Produce original, engaging content formats including: reels, talking-head videos, drone footage edits, carousels, infographics, testimonials, educational posts, behind-the-scenes clips, product demos, and memes
	Write high-converting copy with strong hooks, compelling body text, and clear calls to action for every post
	Translate solar energy concepts (inverters, battery storage, off-grid systems, ROI, load calculations) into simple, engaging content that non-technical audiences understand and share
	Design professional, on-brand graphics using tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva Pro, CorelDRAW, or equivalent
	Produce social media templates, banners, flyers, proposal decks, and promotional materials that reflect the company's brand identity
	Edit talking-head videos, drone footage, product installation clips, and customer testimonials to a high cinematic standard
	Use colour grading, transitions, motion graphics, text overlays, sound design, and cinematic effects to elevate raw footage
	Produce short-form viral reels (15–60 sec) for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts
	Edit long-form YouTube content (3–15 min) with chapters, B-roll, graphics, and professional pacing
	Leverage AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, RunwayML, etc.) to speed up content production without compromising quality.
	Automate scheduling, reporting, and repetitive workflows using social media management platforms and automation tools
	Track, analyse, and report on key metrics: reach, impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, click-through rate, and lead volume
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable recommendations
	Use platform analytics (Meta Insights, YouTube Studio, LinkedIn Analytics, Google My Business Insights) to refine strategy
	Run A/B tests on content types, captions, and posting times to continuously improve performance
	Handle all inbound DMs and comment enquiries professionally and promptly, with the goal of qualifying leads and booking consultations
	Manage and grow WhatsApp broadcast lists and status content as a supplementary channel


General Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Mass Communication, Marketing, Digital Media, Design, or a related field
	Minimum 2–3 years of proven experience managing social media accounts and creating content for a brand, agency, or business
	Demonstrable portfolio of content created across multiple platforms (essential — must be presented at interview)
	Prior experience in an energy, tech, real estate, or product-based company is an advantage


Technical Skills (Must-Have):


	Graphic Design: Canva Pro, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW (proficiency in at least two)
	Video Editing: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (proficiency in at least two)
	Scheduling Tools: Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Hootsuite, or Later
	Analytics: Native platform dashboards (Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, Google My Business)
	AI Tools: Familiarity with AI content and automation tools is a strong advantage
	Photography: Basic smartphone and DSLR photography skills for product and lifestyle shoots
	Copywriting: Ability to write punchy, persuasive, and platform-appropriate copy in English


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

title: Job Openings at Fembol Investments Limited
content:
Fembol Group is a leading provider of comprehensive shipping, freight, and forwarding solutions. We specialize in delivering reliable and cost-effective logistics services to businesses globally. Our commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction has positioned us as a key player in the logistics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Technical Product Manager

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a strategic, technically fluent, and execution-oriented Technical Product Manager to own and drive the development of Fembol’s digital products and platform capabilities.
	You will operate at the intersection of product, engineering, and business, translating complex operational and customer problems into scalable, high-impact technical solutions. You will work closely with engineering teams on system design, APIs, integrations, and platform architecture, while ensuring alignment with business goals and user needs.
	This role is ideal for someone who can think in systems, communicate clearly across technical and non-technical stakeholders, and drive execution in a fast-paced, product-driven environment.


Responsibilities


	Define and own product vision, roadmap, and technical direction aligned with business objectives and platform strategy.
	Lead product discovery by deeply understanding customer needs, operational workflows, and business challenges through research, stakeholder engagement, and data analysis.
	Identify high-impact opportunities through user insights, market trends, and internal data, and translate them into clear product hypotheses and solutions.
	Validate ideas through experimentation, prototyping, and iterative feedback before committing to full-scale development.
	Translate business problems into clear product requirements, technical specifications, user stories, and scalable system designs.
	Partner closely with engineering to design and deliver robust solutions across APIs, integrations, workflows, and core platform infrastructure.
	Drive end-to-end product delivery from discovery and solution design to launch and continuous optimization.
	Own and prioritize the product backlog, balancing business impact, technical feasibility, and long-term scalability.
	Collaborate with engineering teams on architectural decisions, technical tradeoffs, and system design considerations.
	Lead agile/Scrum processes, including sprint planning, backlog grooming, and release coordination.
	Ensure high standards for QA, testing, documentation, reliability, and performance across all product releases.
	Monitor product, technical, and operational performance metrics, using data to drive continuous improvement.
	Serve as the primary bridge between engineering, operations, and business teams, ensuring alignment and clear communication.
	Drive cross-functional collaboration with operations, sales, and leadership to ensure product-market fit and successful adoption.
	Identify opportunities for automation, optimization, and intelligent systems across logistics workflows.
	Own key product and business KPIs, driving measurable impact on efficiency, growth, and user experience.
	Contribute to building a strong product and engineering culture through structured thinking, clear communication, and high execution standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, information systems, or a related field
	4–6+ years of experience in product management, technical product management, or related roles.
	Experience managing Agile product development teams and product backlogs.
	Experience conducting customer research and user testing.
	Proven track record of launching and scaling digital products.
	Experience using AI tools for prototyping is an added advantage.
	Experience using design tools like Figma is an added advantage.
	Strong understanding of product discovery, user research, experimentation, and analytics.
	Experience with product and collaboration tools such as Jira, Productboard, Figma, Miro, Notion, or similar.
	Strong analytical skills, including experience using Excel/Sheets, SQL, or BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) is an advantage.
	Experience in logistics, supply chain, or freight technology is a strong plus.
	CSPO, Scrum, PMP, PRINCE2, or related certifications are an added advantage.


Click here to apply online

 

2.) Full Stack Engineer (Next.js & React Native)

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking an experienced and product-minded Full Stack Engineer to build scalable, intelligent, and user-centric digital products across the Fembol Group ecosystem.
	The ideal candidate will play a critical role in architecting and developing end-to-end solutions across frontend, backend, APIs, and AI-enabled features. You will work closely with product, design, operations, and engineering teams to deliver secure, high-performing software that improves logistics workflows, operational efficiency, and customer experience.
	This role is ideal for an engineer who combines strong software engineering fundamentals with systems thinking, modern AI fluency, and a passion for solving complex business problems through technology.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications using Next.js, NestJS, and TypeScript and any other required technologies.
	Develop robust backend services, APIs, and microservices to support core product functionality.
	Build responsive, intuitive, and performant frontend interfaces with a strong focus on usability and customer experience.
	Architect and implement secure, scalable, and maintainable full stack solutions following modern engineering best practices.
	Translate product requirements, UI designs and technical specifications into high-quality, production-ready software.
	Design and manage RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs for internal and external product integrations.
	Develop and optimize scalable database structures and backend logic using relational and/or NoSQL databases.
	Build distributed and event-driven systems to support logistics and operational workflows.
	Improve application performance, scalability, reliability, and observability.
	Contribute to architectural decisions, code quality standards, and technical documentation.
	Design and implement AI-powered product features using modern LLMs, automation tools, and intelligent workflows document intelligence, workflow automation, or predictive features into products..
	Collaborate with product teams to prototype and ship practical solutions that improve internal operations and customer experience.
	Work closely with the product manager, designers, and cross-functional stakeholders to build high-impact digital products.
	Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies, sprint planning, and collaborative product delivery.
	Support product discovery by contributing technical insights during solution design and planning.
	Collaborate across teams to ensure products are scalable, user-centric, and aligned with business objectives.
	Partner with product manager and engineering teams to maintain high standards for testing, deployment, and release management.
	Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, and modern development operations practices.
	Monitor application health, troubleshoot issues, and improve system resilience and uptime.
	Support cloud infrastructure and deployment environments where necessary.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
	5+ years of experience in Full Stack Software Engineering or related roles.
	Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript and modern full stack development.
	Proven experience building production-grade applications with NestJS and Next.js.
	Strong understanding of backend architecture, APIs, microservices, and distributed systems.
	Experience working with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or similar.
	Experience with cloud platforms and modern deployment environments (AWS, Azure, GCP, or similar).
	Strong understanding of software engineering best practices, system design, and scalable architecture.
	Experience working in Agile product development environments.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to translate business needs into technical solutions.
	Familiarity with AI tooling, prompt engineering and agentic workflows is strongly preferred.
	Experience building or prototyping AI-powered features is a major advantage.
	Familiarity with message queues and event-driven systems (e.g. RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS).
	Experience with monitoring and observability tools.
	Experience with AI coding assistants and modern developer productivity tools is required.
	Familiarity with frontend design systems and collaboration with Figma-based workflows is a plus.


What Success Looks Like in this Role


	Building scalable digital products that improve logistics operations and customer experience
	Shipping reliable, high-quality full stack applications with strong performance and security
	Delivering practical AI-powered solutions that create measurable business impact
	Contributing to engineering excellence, product innovation, and technology scale at Fembol.


Why Join Fembol Group?


	Build products solving real-world logistics and supply chain challenges
	Work at the intersection of software engineering, AI, and logistics innovation
	Help shape next-generation freight technology solutions
	Join a growing, ambitious, technology-driven team building for scale.


Click here to apply online

 

3.) Front End Engineer

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking a product-minded and highly skilled Frontend Engineer with strong expertise in Next.js and React Native to design and build high-quality web and hybrid mobile applications across the Fembol ecosystem.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in developing intuitive, performant, and scalable user experiences for both customer-facing and internal products. You will work closely with product managers, designers, backend engineers, and business teams to translate product ideas into elegant digital experiences across web and mobile.
	This role is ideal for an engineer who combines strong frontend engineering fundamentals, mobile development expertise, and a passion for building impactful products users love.


Key Responsibilities
Front End Web Development:


	Design, build, and maintain modern, scalable web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
	Develop responsive, accessible, and high-performing interfaces optimized across devices and browsers.
	Translate product requirements and UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, production-ready code.
	Build and maintain component libraries and scalable frontend architecture.
	Optimize applications for performance, SEO, usability, and maintainability.


Mobile Application Development (React Native):


	Build and maintain hybrid mobile applications using React Native for iOS and Android.
	Develop intuitive, reliable, and performant mobile experiences aligned with product and business goals.
	Implement reusable mobile components and scalable application structures.
	Integrate mobile applications with backend APIs and third-party services.
	Optimize mobile application performance, responsiveness, and user experience across platforms.


Product Delivery & Collaboration:


	Collaborate closely with the Product Manager, Designers, and other Engineers to ship high-impact digital products.
	Participate in technical planning, sprint execution, and Agile development processes.
	Work from Figma and design systems to implement pixel-accurate, user-centric interfaces.
	Contribute technical input during solution design and help shape product decisions.
	Support product iteration through experimentation, feedback loops, and continuous improvement.


Front End Architecture & Quality:


	Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code following engineering best practices.
	Ensure strong standards for code quality, testing, documentation, and frontend architecture.
	Contribute to application performance optimization, scalability, and technical excellence.
	Troubleshoot bugs, resolve issues, and improve product reliability.
	Support release processes and collaborate on CI/CD workflows where needed.


What Success Looks Like in this Role


	Building exceptional web and mobile experiences that improve customer and operational workflows
	Shipping scalable, reliable, and user-friendly frontend products
	Contributing to faster product delivery and stronger user adoption
	Helping shape a high-quality engineering culture and frontend best practices.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
	3–5+ years of experience in Frontend Engineering or related roles.
	Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and modern frontend development.
	Hands-on experience building production applications with Next.js.
	Strong experience developing hybrid mobile applications using React Native.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, frontend architecture, and component-driven development.
	Experience integrating frontend applications with RESTful APIs and backend services.
	Strong understanding of state management approaches (e.g. Context API, Redux, Zustand, or similar).
	Experience working in Agile product development environments.
	Experience with modern styling frameworks such as Tailwind CSS, Styled Components, or similar.
	Familiarity with React Native ecosystem tools such as Expo is an advantage.
	Experience with testing tools such as Jest, React Testing Library, or Cypress.
	Understanding of mobile app deployment processes for App Store and Google Play.
	Familiarity with performance optimization techniques for web and mobile applications.
	Experience working with design systems and component libraries.
	Familiarity with AI-assisted frontend development tools is an added advantage.
	Strong problem-solving skills and product-oriented thinking.


Why Join the Fembol Group?


	Build products solving real-world logistics challenges
	Work across web and mobile products with meaningful business impact
	Join a growing technology-driven team building innovative freight solutions
	Help shape the digital future of logistics in Africa and beyond


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply
